title: Personal User - no headset policy, all settings unlocked
scenario: All headset settings remain unlocked and changeable for personal users (no headset policy applied) in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and log in as a personal user (or continue as Guest).
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected headset to open Device Settings.
3. Navigate through all available settings: Audio Settings (ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer), Notifications, and any other toggles or sliders.
4. Attempt to change each setting (e.g., toggle ANC on/off, adjust EQ sliders, enable/disable Transparency Mode).
5. Verify the status of each setting reflects the user's changes.
expected: All headset settings are unlocked and can be changed by the personal user. No settings are grayed out, locked, or restricted.
